news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. saw an NSE block trade of 92,024 shares at Rs. 3,207.60.
The transaction totaled Rs. 29.52 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd. saw an NSE block trade of 92,024 shares at Rs. 3,207.60.
The transaction totaled Rs. 29.52 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.

news.title:
Experts shared insights on Deepak Nitrite, Eternal, M&M, Bajaj Housing Finance, REC, and HUL on NDTV Profit.
Recommendations: Buy Eternal, M&M; hold Deepak Nitrite, HUL; avoid REC; buy Bajaj Housing Finance on dips.
news.summary:
Experts shared insights on Deepak Nitrite, Eternal, M&M, Bajaj Housing Finance, REC, and HUL on NDTV Profit.
Recommendations: Buy Eternal, M&M; hold Deepak Nitrite, HUL; avoid REC; buy Bajaj Housing Finance on dips.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra schedules analyst/investor meet for Q4FY26 on May 5, 2026, via a hybrid mode.
The live webcast link requires pre-registration and will be accessible till June 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra schedules analyst/investor meet for Q4FY26 on May 5, 2026, via a hybrid mode.
The live webcast link requires pre-registration and will be accessible till June 4, 2026.

news.title:
Mahindra appoints Rajeev Goyal as CEO for Agri, New Energy, and Powerol businesses.
Goyal joins Mahindra's Group Executive Board after 20 years in auto and farm equipment sectors.
news.summary:
Mahindra appoints Rajeev Goyal as CEO for Agri, New Energy, and Powerol businesses.
Goyal joins Mahindra's Group Executive Board after 20 years in auto and farm equipment sectors.

news.title:
Nomura says CAFE 2027 policy boosts EVs, aiding M&M, Hyundai, Sonacom.
Non-compliance credits may rise from ₹2,500/g in FY28 to ₹4,500/g by FY32.
news.summary:
Nomura says CAFE 2027 policy boosts EVs, aiding M&M, Hyundai, Sonacom.
Non-compliance credits may rise from ₹2,500/g in FY28 to ₹4,500/g by FY32.

news.title:
Angel One's Osho Krishan recommends buying M&M around 3220-3200, target 3450-3500, stop-loss 3020.
Waaree Energies is also a buy; target 3500-3560, stop-loss 3050, supported by bullish technical patterns.
news.summary:
Angel One's Osho Krishan recommends buying M&M around 3220-3200, target 3450-3500, stop-loss 3020.
Waaree Energies is also a buy; target 3500-3560, stop-loss 3050, supported by bullish technical patterns.

news.title:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.
news.summary:
Muthoot Finance approved ₹30/share interim dividend; M&M reported higher March '26 production/sales led by utility vehicles.
Lupin launched dapagliflozin in the US; Torrent Pharma's Gujarat oncology unit was inspected by USFDA from April 6-10, '26.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra shows bullish weekly reversal with support at 200-week MA.
Stock forms higher highs and lows, bouncing off ascending channel trendline.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra shows bullish weekly reversal with support at 200-week MA.
Stock forms higher highs and lows, bouncing off ascending channel trendline.

news.title:
Delhi's EV Policy 2026-2030 aims to phase out petrol vehicles, boosting EV adoption.
Bajaj Auto, TVS, Mahindra, Tata Power, Exide may benefit; focus on EVs, charging infra, batteries.
news.summary:
Delhi's EV Policy 2026-2030 aims to phase out petrol vehicles, boosting EV adoption.
Bajaj Auto, TVS, Mahindra, Tata Power, Exide may benefit; focus on EVs, charging infra, batteries.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra's subsidiary MOICML has sold its 99.04% stake in Erkunt Foundry to Turkish buyers.
The divestment aligns with the company's capital allocation framework, ceasing Erkunt Foundry as a subsidiary.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra's subsidiary MOICML has sold its 99.04% stake in Erkunt Foundry to Turkish buyers.
The divestment aligns with the company's capital allocation framework, ceasing Erkunt Foundry as a subsidiary.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra released March 2026 production, sales, and export data.
Utility and electric vehicle sales showed mixed performance; figures may vary post audit.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra released March 2026 production, sales, and export data.
Utility and electric vehicle sales showed mixed performance; figures may vary post audit.

news.title:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.
news.summary:
CLSA turns bullish on Indian equities, citing reduced geopolitical risks, valuations below 10-year averages, and improved risk-reward profiles.
Portfolio changes include exiting IT for defence, trimming Bajaj Auto/M&M, raising financials, and preferring Bajaj Finance over IndusInd Bank.

news.title:
M&M to announce Q4 and FY26 results on May 5; dividend likely.
Brokerages expect YoY profit growth but sequential decline due to seasonality.
news.summary:
M&M to announce Q4 and FY26 results on May 5; dividend likely.
Brokerages expect YoY profit growth but sequential decline due to seasonality.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra to acquire 26% stake in Neon Hybren Pvt Ltd.
Investment of Rs. 11.2 cr aims to develop renewable energy project.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra to acquire 26% stake in Neon Hybren Pvt Ltd.
Investment of Rs. 11.2 cr aims to develop renewable energy project.

news.title:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 and Sensex rebounded as US-Iran ceasefire led Nifty to rise 3.5% to 23,938 and Sensex 3.7% to 77,392.
Large-cap stocks like DLF, M&M, HDFC Life, LIC, Adani Ports, ICICI Bank show potential upside up to 63% amid valuation gaps.

news.title:
Analysts recommend 'Buy' for Samvardhana Motherson, Mahindra & Mahindra, and UNO Minda, citing strong growth potential.
Hero MotoCorp advised as 'Buy on Dips', 'Hold' for IRFC, while Yes Bank flagged as 'Avoid' by experts.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend 'Buy' for Samvardhana Motherson, Mahindra & Mahindra, and UNO Minda, citing strong growth potential.
Hero MotoCorp advised as 'Buy on Dips', 'Hold' for IRFC, while Yes Bank flagged as 'Avoid' by experts.

news.title:
Mahindra & Mahindra raises domestic tractor prices from April 8, 2026.
Swaraj Tractors will follow with a price hike from April 21, 2026.
news.summary:
Mahindra & Mahindra raises domestic tractor prices from April 8, 2026.
Swaraj Tractors will follow with a price hike from April 21, 2026.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal lists Maruti Suzuki, TVS Motor, M&M as top picks amid Q4 challenges.
Auto sector faces input cost, crude price risks; ancillaries like Motherson, Endurance also favored.

news.title:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.
news.summary:
MOFSL sees FY27 as favorable for Indian equities post FY26 underperformance caused by FII outflows and geopolitical risks.
Top stock picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, ICICI Bank, M&M, Titan, Infosys, and TVS Motors; mid-caps outperform large-caps.

news.title:
India's FY26 tractor sales rose 23% YoY to 1.05M units, driven by rural demand.
Tractor and Mechanisation Association attributes growth to improved momentum in FY26.
news.summary:
India's FY26 tractor sales rose 23% YoY to 1.05M units, driven by rural demand.
Tractor and Mechanisation Association attributes growth to improved momentum in FY26.
